svg.text: cdc.appbase — Base Docker Image for CDC Containers
• Minimal Alpine Linux distribution — small footprint for security and efficiency
• Standard packages: bash, curl, ca-certificates, tzdata, supervisor
Used as FROM in: cdc.grpc-in, cdc.grpc-out, cdc.http-out, cdc.syslog-out, cdc.agent, cdc.dns-in, cdc.rpz-in, cdc.wapi-in, soar-light
• /infoblox/data/ directory structure (in/, out/, etc/, bin/, log/)
• supervisord for process management | Non-root user: infoblox
• Common entrypoint scripts and health check base | CA certificates for TLS
